ddls:
CREATE TABLE "twitter_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Twitter user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the Twitter user */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "total_tweets" REAL /* Total number of tweets the user has posted */,
  "lists" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is a part of */,
  "twitter_age" INTEGER /* Age of the user's Twitter account in days */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified or not */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the Twitter user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language used by the Twitter user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Twitter user's profile */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "banner_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's banner picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was posted */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet was retweeted */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet was favorited */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes of the tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions in the tweet */,
  "urls" TEXT /* URLs in the tweet */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet (positive, negative, or neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES twitter_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the metric belongs to */,
  "followers_to_following" REAL /* Ratio of followers to following for the user */,
  "average_tweets_per_day" REAL /* Average number of tweets the user posts per day */,
  "average_list_per_day" REAL /* Average number of lists the user is added to per day */,
  "followers_per_day" REAL /* Average number of followers the user gains per day */,
  "followers_per_age" REAL /* Average number of followers the user gains per age */,
  "following_per_age" REAL /* Average number of users the user follows per age */,
  "average_engagement_rate" REAL /* Average engagement rate of the user's tweets */,
  "average_reply_rate" REAL /* Average reply rate of the user's tweets */,
  "average_quote_rate" REAL /* Average quote rate of the user's tweets */,
  "average_retweet_rate" REAL /* Average retweet rate of the user's tweets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES twitter_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party affiliation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the affiliation belongs to */,
  "party_left" INTEGER /* Whether the user is affiliated with the left party */,
  "party_middle" INTEGER /* Whether the user is affiliated with the middle party */,
  "party_neutral" INTEGER /* Whether the user is affiliated with the neutral party */,
  "party_right" INTEGER /* Whether the user is affiliated with the right party */,
  "clustering" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the user's network */,
  "degree_centrality" REAL /* Degree centrality of the user's network */,
  "closeness" REAL /* Closeness of the user's network */,
  "betweeness" REAL /* Betweeness of the user's network */,
  "pr" REAL /* PageRank of the user's network */,
  "party_affiliation_score" REAL /* Party affiliation score of the user (range: 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_affiliations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES twitter_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network feature */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the feature belongs to */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the user's network */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness of the user's network */,
  "closeness" REAL /* Closeness of the user's network */,
  "eigenvector_centrality" REAL /* Eigenvector centrality of the user's network */,
  "clustering_coefficient" REAL /* Clustering coefficient of the user's network */,
  "average_neighbor_degree" REAL /* Average neighbor degree of the user's network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_features_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES twitter_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_weight" REAL /* Weight of the topic for the user (range: 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_topics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES twitter_users ("user_id")
)
